zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford於1359年出生在英國史洛普爾布福德時，他的父親Sir Geoffrey Cornwall25歲，母親Cecila Seymour23歲。他於1381年與Cecilia Alice Merbury在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1443年1月10日在他的家鄉享年84歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾布福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford于1359年出生在英国史洛普爾布福德时，他的父亲Sir Geoffrey Cornwall25岁，母亲Cecila Seymour23岁。他于1381年与Cecilia Alice Merbury在英国賀福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1443年1月10日在他的家乡享年84岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾布福德。

nameMeanings.name: Cornwall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornwell
meanings: habitational name from Cornwell in Oxfordshire, named from Old English corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

variant of Cornwall or Cornhill; in southeastern England mainly a habitational name from Cornhill in London but elsewhere alternatively from Cornhill (Northumberland) or one of the many minor places so called, often becoming Cornell .

variants.name: Corney
meanings: habitational name from Corney in Cumbria or Corney in Hertfordshire (now known as Corneybury), from Old English corn ‘grain’ or corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + ēg ‘island’. It seems possible, from the distribution of early forms, that it may also derive from a lost place in Lancashire. Alternatively, a habitational name from Corney (Lancashire), later named Corneyrow, now Corner Row or Cornoe in Greenhalgh (alias Greenall), in the parish of Kirkham. Corney was sometimes pronounced and spelled Cornah, Corner, Cornall, Gorney, and Gornall.
perhaps a shortened form of   Cornwall   or   Cornish  , or a metathesized form of   Croney  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford was born in 1359, in Burford, Shropshire, England, his father, Sir Geoffrey Cornwall, was 25 and his mother, Cecila Seymour, was 23. He married Cecilia Alice Merbury in 1381, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 10 January 1443, in his hometown, at the age of 84, and was buried in Burford, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford est né en 1359, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Geoffrey Cornwall, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Cecila Seymour, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia Alice Merbury en 1381, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1443, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford 1359 in Burford, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Geoffrey Cornwall 25 und seine Mutter Cecila Seymour 23. Er hat 1381 in Herefordshire, England Cecilia Alice Merbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1443 im Alter von 84 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Burford, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford è nato il nel 1359 nel Burford, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Geoffrey Cornwall, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Cecila Seymour, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia Alice Merbury nel 1381, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 10 gennaio 1443, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Burford, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burfordが1359年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Geoffrey Cornwallは25歳，母Cecila Seymourは23歳であった。1381年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでCecilia Alice Merburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1443年1月10日に故郷で84歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford(이)가 1359년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey Cornwall(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecila Seymour(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1381년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Cecilia Alice Merbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1443년 1월 10일 그의 고향에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford nasceu em 1359, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Geoffrey Cornwall, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Cecila Seymour, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia Alice Merbury em 1381, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1443, em sua cidade natal, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford родился в 1359 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey Cornwall было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecila Seymour, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia Alice Merbury в 1381 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 10 января 1443 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford nació en 1359, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Geoffrey Cornwall, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Cecila Seymour, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Cecilia Alice Merbury en 1381, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 10 de enero de 1443, en su pueblo, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
